game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **샐리의 법칙 (Sally's Law)** Sally's Law is a unique 2D puzzle platformer featuring a two-phase gameplay loop for each level. First, players control Sally, who automatically runs forward and can jump by tapping the screen, experiencing seemingly miraculous "luck" as obstacles vanish and paths open just in time. Immediately after, players replay the exact same level as Sally's father, a spirit who can manipulate the environment by tapping or dragging objects like platforms and switches, with the objective to actively create the "luck" Sally experienced by clearing her path within precise 1-2 second timing windows. Progression is linear, with each completed two-phase level unlocking the next, and the narrative unfolds through inter-level cutscenes revealing the father-daughter story. Failure occurs if Sally falls into a hazard or gets stuck, or if the father fails to clear her path, requiring a full level restart.
game_info.description: Guide Sally through her miraculous journey in this two-phase puzzle platformer. In Phase 1, control Sally as she runs automatically forward - press SPACE to jump over obstacles. Watch as mysterious forces clear her path. In Phase 2, become Sally's father and manipulate the environment using arrow keys to select objects and SPACE to activate them, creating the "miracles" Sally experienced. Complete both phases to progress through levels and uncover their touching story.
game_info.controls:
Phase 1 (Sally): SPACE - Jump
Phase 2 (Father): Arrow Keys - Select object, SPACE - Activate selected object, Z - Fast forward time
ESC - Pause/Unpause
R - Restart to main menu
ENTER - Start game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic gameplay mechanics including Sally's movement, jumping, and father's object manipulation. Validates that both phases can be played and transitions work correctly. Tests simple level completion without complex timing requirements.
TEST_1.strategy_description: In Phase 1, jump at appropriate times to navigate obstacles. In Phase 2, select and activate objects in the correct sequence to clear Sally's path. Use simple timing and straightforward object interactions to complete the level.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Both phases complete successfully with Sally reaching the goal. Game transitions properly between phases and levels. No collision errors or stuck states occur. Test is successful when GAME_OVER_WIN is achieved.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy across multiple levels. Validates precise timing windows for object manipulation, complex puzzle solving, and complete game progression. Tests the full narrative flow and level unlocking system.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Execute perfect jumps in Phase 1 while monitoring upcoming obstacles. In Phase 2, use optimal timing to activate platforms and switches exactly when Sally needs them. Progress through all levels using the most efficient path and object interaction sequence.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete all levels with minimal retries, achieving perfect timing for all object manipulations. Game reaches final level completion and GAME_OVER_WIN state. All narrative elements display correctly between levels.
